results.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM identity.users

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM catalog.products 
WHERE status = 'active' AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT code FROM geo.currencies

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS refunded_orders_count
FROM sales.returns
WHERE refunded_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT AVG(grand_total) AS average_grand_total
FROM sales.orders

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM support.tickets 
WHERE priority = 'urgent'
SELECT DISTINCT status FROM sales.orders

SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_captured_amount
FROM billing.payments
WHERE captured_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS archived_product_count
FROM catalog.products
WHERE deleted_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_subscriptions_count
FROM billing.subscriptions
WHERE status = 'active'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geo.countries WHERE continent = 'Europe'

SELECT AVG(employee_count) AS average_employee_count
FROM crm.accounts
SELECT COUNT(*) AS signups_count FROM identity.users

SELECT COUNT(*) AS open_tickets_count
FROM support.tickets
WHERE closed_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM billing.invoices 
WHERE due_at < NOW() AND amount_due > 0

SELECT 
    catalog.products.id AS product_id,
    catalog.products.name AS product_name,
    catalog.brands.name AS brand_name
FROM 
    catalog.products
LEFT JOIN 
    catalog.brands ON catalog.products.brand_id = catalog.brands.id

SELECT 
    pr.id AS review_id,
    pr.title AS review_title,
    pr.body AS review_body,
    pr.rating AS review_rating,
    pr.is_verified_purchase,
    pr.is_approved,
    pr.helpful_count,
    pr.created_at AS review_created_at,
    p.name AS product_name
FROM 
    catalog.product_reviews pr
JOIN 
    catalog.products p ON pr.product_id = p.id

SELECT 
    subscriptions.id AS subscription_id,
    plans.name AS plan_name
FROM 
    billing.subscriptions
JOIN 
    billing.plans ON subscriptions.plan_id = plans.id

SELECT 
  sales.orders.id AS order_id,
  sales.orders.order_number,
  identity.users.email AS user_email
FROM 
  sales.orders
JOIN 
  identity.users ON sales.orders.user_id = identity.users.id

SELECT p.id, p.name
FROM catalog.products p
LEFT JOIN catalog.product_reviews r ON p.id = r.product_id
WHERE r.id IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_subscribers
FROM billing.subscriptions s
JOIN billing.plans p ON s.plan_id = p.id
WHERE p.code = 'pro' AND s.status = 'active'

SELECT 
  currency_code, 
  SUM(grand_total) AS total_revenue
FROM 
  sales.orders
GROUP BY 
  currency_code

SELECT tenant_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM sales.orders
GROUP BY tenant_id

SELECT p.id, p.name, AVG(pr.rating) AS average_rating
FROM catalog.products p
JOIN catalog.product_reviews pr ON p.id = pr.product_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.name
HAVING AVG(pr.rating) > 4

SELECT u.id, u.public_id, u.email, u.full_name
FROM identity.users u
JOIN sales.orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
GROUP BY u.id, u.public_id, u.email, u.full_name
HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 3

SELECT 
    c.name AS country_name,
    SUM(o.grand_total) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    sales.orders o
JOIN 
    geo.addresses a ON o.shipping_address_id = a.id
JOIN 
    geo.countries c ON a.country_id = c.id
GROUP BY 
    c.name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC

SELECT 
    p.id AS product_id,
    p.name AS product_name,
    SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_units_sold
FROM 
    sales.order_items oi
JOIN 
    catalog.products p ON oi.product_variant_id = p.id
GROUP BY 
    p.id, p.name
ORDER BY 
    total_units_sold DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT DISTINCT u.email
FROM sales.returns r
JOIN sales.orders o ON r.order_id = o.id
JOIN identity.users u ON o.user_id = u.id
WHERE r.refunded_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.user_id) AS user_count
FROM geo.addresses a
JOIN geo.countries c ON a.country_id = c.id
WHERE c.name = 'Germany' AND a.user_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
    p.code AS plan_code,
    COUNT(s.id) AS active_subscriptions_count
FROM 
    billing.subscriptions s
JOIN 
    billing.plans p ON s.plan_id = p.id
WHERE 
    s.status = 'active'
GROUP BY 
    p.code

SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', placed_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM 
    sales.orders
WHERE 
    placed_at >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months')
GROUP BY 
    month
ORDER BY 
    month

SELECT 
    t.id AS tenant_id,
    t.name AS tenant_name,
    SUM(o.grand_total) AS total_revenue,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(o.grand_total) DESC) AS revenue_rank
FROM 
    identity.tenants t
JOIN 
    sales.orders o ON t.id = o.tenant_id
GROUP BY 
    t.id, t.name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC

SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (resolved_at - created_at)) / 86400) AS average_days_to_resolve
FROM support.tickets
WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS matching_orders_count
FROM sales.orders o
JOIN identity.users u ON o.user_id = u.id
WHERE o.tenant_id = u.tenant_id

SELECT 
    c.id AS category_id, 
    c.name AS category_name, 
    COUNT(pc.product_id) AS product_count
FROM 
    catalog.categories c
JOIN 
    catalog.product_categories pc ON c.id = pc.category_id
GROUP BY 
    c.id, c.name
ORDER BY 
    product_count DESC
LIMIT 3

SELECT SUM(grand_total) AS total_revenue_eur
FROM sales.orders
WHERE currency_code = 'EUR' AND placed_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE cancelled_at IS NOT NULL)::decimal / COUNT(*) AS cancelled_fraction
FROM 
    sales.orders

SELECT id, tenant_id, name, legal_name, domain, industry, employee_count, annual_revenue, currency_code, owner_user_id, phone, website, is_active, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
FROM crm.accounts
WHERE employee_count > 100

SELECT 
    s.plan_id,
    AVG(o.grand_total) AS average_order_value
FROM 
    billing.subscriptions s
JOIN 
    sales.orders o ON s.user_id = o.user_id AND s.tenant_id = o.tenant_id
GROUP BY 
    s.plan_id

SELECT 
    status, 
    COUNT(*) AS paid_invoices_count
FROM 
    billing.invoices
WHERE 
    paid_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    status

SELECT COUNT(*) AS bounced_sessions_count
FROM analytics.web_sessions
WHERE is_bounce = TRUE

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM pricing.coupons 
WHERE status = 'active' 
AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > NOW())

SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_successful_refunds
FROM billing.payment_refunds
WHERE status = 'SUCCESSFUL'

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM audit.audit_log 
WHERE action = 'delete'
SELECT AVG(score) AS average_csat_score FROM support.csat_responses

SELECT COUNT(*) AS won_opportunities_count
FROM crm.opportunities
WHERE is_won = TRUE

SELECT COUNT(*) AS churned_subscriptions_count
FROM billing.subscriptions
WHERE ended_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT campaign_id) AS marketing_blasts_sent
FROM marketing.campaign_messages
WHERE sent_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS goods_out_count
FROM inventory.stock_movements
WHERE kind = 'goods_out'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS converted_leads_count
FROM crm.leads
WHERE converted_account_id IS NOT NULL OR converted_contact_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM comms.webhook_deliveries 
WHERE status = 'failed'

SELECT 
    status, 
    COUNT(*) AS notification_count
FROM 
    comms.notifications
GROUP BY 
    status

SELECT action, COUNT(*) AS entry_count
FROM audit.audit_log
GROUP BY action
ORDER BY entry_count DESC

SELECT 
  DATE_TRUNC('month', occurred_at) AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM 
  analytics.events
GROUP BY 
  DATE_TRUNC('month', occurred_at)
ORDER BY 
  month

SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS failed_count
FROM ops.job_runs
WHERE status = 'failed' -- Adjust the status as per the actual failure status in your system
GROUP BY status

SELECT 
    COUNT(bounced_at)::decimal / COUNT(*) AS bounce_fraction
FROM 
    marketing.campaign_messages

SELECT currency_code, SUM(total) AS total_invoiced_amount
FROM billing.invoices
GROUP BY currency_code

SELECT tenant_id, COUNT(*) AS open_opportunities_count
FROM crm.opportunities
WHERE is_closed = false
GROUP BY tenant_id

SELECT 
  comms.notifications.id AS notification_id,
  comms.notifications.title AS notification_title,
  comms.notifications.body AS notification_body,
  identity.users.email AS user_email
FROM 
  comms.notifications
JOIN 
  identity.users ON comms.notifications.user_id = identity.users.id
WHERE 
  comms.notifications.tenant_id = identity.users.tenant_id

SELECT 
    o.id AS opportunity_id,
    o.name AS opportunity_name,
    p.name AS pipeline_name
FROM 
    crm.opportunities o
JOIN 
    crm.pipelines p ON o.pipeline_id = p.id

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pr.id) AS refund_count
FROM billing.payment_refunds pr
JOIN billing.payments p ON pr.payment_id = p.id
WHERE p.captured_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT c.id, c.code
FROM pricing.coupons c
LEFT JOIN pricing.coupon_redemptions cr ON c.id = cr.coupon_id
WHERE cr.id IS NULL

SELECT 
    c.code AS coupon_code, 
    SUM(cr.discount_amount) AS total_redeemed_discount
FROM 
    pricing.coupons c
JOIN 
    pricing.coupon_redemptions cr ON c.id = cr.coupon_id
GROUP BY 
    c.code

SELECT 
    sa.id AS agent_id, 
    AVG(cr.score) AS average_score
FROM 
    support.csat_responses cr
JOIN 
    support.support_agents sa ON cr.rated_agent_id = sa.id
GROUP BY 
    sa.id
HAVING 
    AVG(cr.score) < 3

SELECT 
    c.name AS campaign_name, 
    COUNT(cm.id) AS message_count
FROM 
    marketing.campaigns c
JOIN 
    marketing.campaign_messages cm ON c.id = cm.campaign_id
GROUP BY 
    c.id, c.name
HAVING 
    COUNT(cm.id) > 100

SELECT 
    p.id AS pipeline_id,
    p.name AS pipeline_name,
    COUNT(o.id) AS won_opportunities_count
FROM 
    crm.pipelines p
LEFT JOIN 
    crm.opportunities o ON p.id = o.pipeline_id
WHERE 
    o.is_won = TRUE
GROUP BY 
    p.id, p.name
ORDER BY 
    won_opportunities_count DESC

SELECT
    date_trunc('month', occurred_at) AS month,
    SUM(amount) FILTER (WHERE direction = 'debit') AS monthly_debit,
    SUM(SUM(amount) FILTER (WHERE direction = 'debit')) OVER (ORDER BY date_trunc('month', occurred_at)) AS running_total_debit
FROM
    billing.ledger_entries
GROUP BY
    date_trunc('month', occurred_at)
ORDER BY
    month

SELECT event_name, COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM analytics.events
GROUP BY event_name
ORDER BY event_count DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    sa.display_name, 
    AVG(cr.score) AS average_csat_score
FROM 
    support.csat_responses cr
JOIN 
    support.support_agents sa 
ON 
    cr.rated_agent_id = sa.user_id
GROUP BY 
    sa.display_name

SELECT 
    w.name AS warehouse_name,
    COUNT(sm.id) AS stock_movement_count
FROM 
    inventory.stock_movements sm
JOIN 
    inventory.stock_locations sl ON sm.stock_location_id = sl.id
JOIN 
    inventory.warehouses w ON sl.warehouse_id = w.id
GROUP BY 
    w.name

SELECT DISTINCT u.email
FROM identity.users u
JOIN marketing.campaign_messages cm ON u.id = cm.user_id
WHERE cm.opened_at IS NOT NULL
AND u.id NOT IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT o.user_id
  FROM sales.orders o
)

SELECT 
    p.code AS plan_code,
    SUM(i.total) AS total_invoiced_amount
FROM 
    billing.invoices i
JOIN 
    billing.plans p ON i.subscription_id = p.id
WHERE 
    i.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY 
    p.code

SELECT
    c.name AS country_name,
    SUM(r.refund_total) AS total_refunded
FROM
    sales.returns r
JOIN
    sales.orders o ON r.order_id = o.id
JOIN
    geo.addresses a ON o.shipping_address_id = a.id
JOIN
    geo.countries c ON a.country_id = c.id
GROUP BY
    c.name
ORDER BY
    total_refunded DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS matching_notifications_count
FROM comms.notifications n
JOIN identity.users u ON n.user_id = u.id
WHERE n.tenant_id = u.tenant_id

SELECT DISTINCT u.email
FROM billing.plans p
JOIN billing.subscriptions s ON p.id = s.plan_id
JOIN identity.users u ON s.user_id = u.id
JOIN support.tickets t ON u.id = t.requester_user_id
WHERE p.name = 'enterprise'
  AND s.status = 'active'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS abandoned_baskets_count
FROM sales.carts
WHERE abandoned_at IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales.fulfillments WHERE delivered_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_product_variants_count
FROM catalog.product_variants
WHERE is_active = true

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT po.id) AS fully_received_po_count
FROM inventory.purchase_orders po
JOIN inventory.purchase_order_lines pol ON po.id = pol.purchase_order_id
GROUP BY po.id
HAVING SUM(pol.quantity_ordered) = SUM(pol.quantity_received)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS rejected_attempts
FROM identity.login_attempts
WHERE succeeded = false

SELECT COUNT(*) AS green_lit_returns
FROM sales.returns
WHERE approved_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM comms.email_log 
WHERE status = 'failed'

SELECT AVG(duration_seconds) AS average_duration_seconds
FROM analytics.page_views

SELECT 
    gateway, 
    SUM(amount) AS total_captured_amount
FROM 
    billing.payments
WHERE 
    captured_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    gateway

SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM sales.orders
GROUP BY status

SELECT 
  EXTRACT(HOUR FROM analytics.events.occurred_at) AS hour_of_day,
  COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM 
  analytics.events
GROUP BY 
  hour_of_day
ORDER BY 
  event_count DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT 
  (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'delivered')::decimal / COUNT(*)) AS success_fraction
FROM 
  comms.email_log
results.error: invalid input value for enum delivery_status: "delivered"

SELECT 
    tm.ticket_id, 
    COUNT(tm.id) AS message_count
FROM 
    support.ticket_messages tm
GROUP BY 
    tm.ticket_id
HAVING 
    COUNT(tm.id) >= 8

SELECT 
    oi.order_id, 
    SUM(oi.line_total) AS total_line_value
FROM 
    sales.order_items oi
GROUP BY 
    oi.order_id
ORDER BY 
    total_line_value DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT 
    shipments.tracking_number, 
    orders.order_number
FROM 
    sales.shipments
JOIN 
    sales.fulfillments ON shipments.fulfillment_id = fulfillments.id
JOIN 
    sales.orders ON fulfillments.order_id = orders.id
WHERE 
    shipments.delivered_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
  c.id AS contact_id,
  c.first_name,
  c.last_name,
  a.name AS account_name
FROM 
  crm.contacts c
LEFT JOIN 
  crm.accounts a ON c.account_id = a.id
WHERE 
  c.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT 
    pm.kind, 
    COUNT(p.id) AS captured_payments_count
FROM 
    billing.payments p
JOIN 
    billing.payment_methods pm ON p.payment_method_id = pm.id
WHERE 
    p.captured_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    pm.kind

SELECT 
    b.name AS brand_name,
    SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold
FROM 
    sales.order_items oi
JOIN 
    catalog.products p ON oi.product_variant_id = p.id
JOIN 
    catalog.brands b ON p.brand_id = b.id
GROUP BY 
    b.name
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity_sold DESC

SELECT 
    w.name AS warehouse_name, 
    COUNT(f.id) AS fulfillment_count
FROM 
    inventory.warehouses w
JOIN 
    sales.fulfillments f ON w.id = f.warehouse_id
WHERE 
    f.status IN ('shipped', 'delivered')
GROUP BY 
    w.name
ORDER BY 
    fulfillment_count DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    currency_code, 
    SUM(amount) AS total_succeeded_refund_amount
FROM 
    billing.payment_refunds
WHERE 
    status = 'succeeded'
GROUP BY 
    currency_code

SELECT 
    u.id AS user_id,
    u.full_name,
    o.placed_at,
    o.grand_total,
    SUM(o.grand_total) OVER (PARTITION BY u.id ORDER BY o.placed_at) AS running_total
FROM 
    sales.orders o
JOIN 
    identity.users u ON o.user_id = u.id
ORDER BY 
    u.id, o.placed_at
LIMIT 50

WITH monthly_order_counts AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('month', placed_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS order_count
  FROM
    sales.orders
  WHERE
    placed_at IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    date_trunc('month', placed_at)
  ORDER BY
    month
),
monthly_changes AS (
  SELECT
    month,
    order_count,
    order_count - LAG(order_count, 1, 0) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS change_from_previous_month
  FROM
    monthly_order_counts
)
SELECT
  month,
  order_count,
  change_from_previous_month
FROM
  monthly_changes

SELECT owner_user_id, COUNT(*) AS won_deals_count
FROM crm.deals
WHERE signed_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY owner_user_id
ORDER BY won_deals_count DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM identity.users u
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 
  FROM identity.login_attempts la
  WHERE la.user_id = u.id AND la.succeeded = true
)

SELECT 
    p.id AS product_id,
    p.name AS product_name,
    COUNT(pr.id) AS approved_review_count
FROM 
    catalog.products p
JOIN 
    catalog.product_reviews pr ON p.id = pr.product_id
WHERE 
    pr.is_approved = TRUE
GROUP BY 
    p.id, p.name
ORDER BY 
    approved_review_count DESC
LIMIT 10
